title: What's New in MSS U5.2
text: What's New in MSS U5.2 The MSS U5.2 connector enables you to connect to Microsoft SQL Server 2017. Default behavior of sql92npw has changed When using MSS U5.2, the sql92npw option defaults to on. In earlier versions of the connector the default was off. For more information, see sql92npw .
